Crt1ExportToExcelDesc: Export the selection to Microsoft Excel.
Crt1CreateStudyDesc: Create a new request within the current verification request.
Crt1CreateValidationContractDesc: Add the selected elements to a new verification request. If none are selected and the architecture is displayed, all elements in the diagram are added.
StudyFilterToggleCmdDesc: Hide or show background content that is not included in the verification request.

AddToARDesc: Add the selections to the verification request, which must be in the Authoring state.

RemoveFromARDesc: Remove the selections from the current verification request that is in the Authoring state.

Crt1AddObjectToResultPanelDesc: Add reports to the verification request.
Crt1RemoveAROutputDesc: Remove the selected elements from the verification request.
Crt1RemoveStudyOutputDesc: Remove the selected elements from the study.
ToggleInOutForTableDesc: Change the parameter from input to output or from output to input.
UnuseAttrForTableDesc: Remove the selected parameters from the verification request.

syncMeasurableAttrConfirmation: Out-of-date input parameters will be refreshed, and measured values of output parameters will be removed.

publishMeasurableAttrConfirmation: Publishing output parameters will update their corresponding source parameters.
publishMeasurableAttrInformation: All output parameters have been published.
